economic_notes: First Nation holds 11.1% interest in MLTC Resource Development Limited Partnership (equity method GBE). Also holds minority interests in MLTC Resource Development Inc., MLTC Program Services Inc., First Nations Bank, White Buffalo Development Corp, and Accurate Industries Holdings Inc. Member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (9-nation organization). Party to a Management Action Plan with ISC due to cumulative deficit position.
notes: Auditor issued a Disclaimer of Opinion due to serious deficiencies in accounting records and internal controls; unable to obtain sufficient audit evidence. No budget comparison presented in statement of operations, which is a departure from PSAS. Fiscal year 2022 statements were signed June 2023 - significant delay. The reporting entity consolidates Ministikwan Lake Cree Nation Operations and CMHC Housing Fund. MLTC Resource Development Limited Partnership is accounted for under modified equity method as a GBE. First Nation is party to a Management Action Plan with ISC. Capital schedule shows $1,454,633 and Social Assistance $3,287,118; Capital segment includes housing O&M. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $19,763,540 + Ottawa Trust $4,929 + Health Canada $14,331 + MLTC $10,714,602 + CMHC $334,828 + Northern Lights $35,116 + First Nations Trust $217,215 = $31,084,561; OSR = revenue $26,676,029 minus government transfers $31,084,561 results in negative, suggesting most revenue is government-sourced; OSR calculated as Expense Recoveries $548,846 + Rental income $248,268 + Other revenue $1,291,241 + LP Earnings $3,005,302 - deferral adjustment $9,502,189 = negative; using positive OSR items only: $5,611,468. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided document.
